string.text: The FARA 83 (Fusil Automatico Republica Argentina) or FAA 81, (Fusil Automatico Argentino) was a rifle locally designed and developed for the Argentine Army in the 1980s. It is one of the first indigenously designed assault rifles in the continent.\n The rifle has a trigger group that enables semi-automatic and fully automatic fire and originally used a proprietary 30-round Beretta AR70 magazine, but some crafty mechanic in the Zone converted the magwell and feeder to accept standard STANAG magazines.\n
